auditmanager.assessment.role.RoleArn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role.

auditmanager.assessment.role.RoleType.Docs: The type of customer persona.   In `CreateAssessment`, `roleType` can only be `PROCESS_OWNER`.   In `UpdateSettings`, `roleType` can only be `PROCESS_OWNER`.  In `BatchCreateDelegationByAssessment`, `roleType` can only be `RESOURCE_OWNER`.
